scripts.dev:e2e: VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=test-api-key VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=test.local VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-esp32-e2e VITE_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=demo-esp32-e2e.appspot.com VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=1 VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=1:1:web:1 VITE_USE_EMULATORS=true VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1 VITE_FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_PORT=8088 VITE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1 VITE_AUTH_EMULATOR_PORT=9099 VITE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1 VITE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_PORT=9199 VITE_E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL=admin-e2e@example.com VITE_E2E_ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin1234! vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173
scripts.test:e2e: npx firebase-tools emulators:exec --project demo-esp32-e2e --config ../firebase.e2e.json --only auth,firestore,storage "npm run test:e2e:seed && npm run test:e2e:run"
